verbatim_text: Yeah. It would be nice to know why. I think it's hard to say. I think for some of these skills, by the way, these skills that we're evaluating on weren't in the training set. So these are downstream skills. I would say that probably within our framework, the cleanest explanation would probably be like there weren't really any skills that were related to word analogy. And sometimes that happens. We had other failure modes with this, where sometimes we would estimate the graph and the skills graph would be dense or it would be empty. And in those cases, you can't really do anything. It actually looks like it also doesn't hurt, I think, on that. Yeah, it doesn't tear. Well, wait. Yes, it doesn't hurt that much. But by doing this, you did end up wasting a lot of compute by trying to construct the skills graph.
